name: Curried Lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak onion in warm water until soft, about 5 minutes.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add onion and sauté until golden brown, about 4 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to low. Add spices and stir for 1 minute.
5. Add lamb to the skillet. Increase heat to medium-high and cook, stirring frequently, until meat is evenly browned, 10 to 15 minutes.
6. Add stock and salt. Stir occasionally.
7. Reduce heat to medium, cover, and cook until meat is tender, about 20 minutes.
8. Simmer uncovered until sauce thickens, about 20 minutes.
9. Stir in yogurt and lemon juice. Serve immediately over cooked rice.
